model_information.description: Population K-PD model for fitusiran with antithrombin lowering via RISC-mediated inhibition of AT production.
model_information.author: Jane Knochel
model_information.output_label: Observed AT (%), RISC Concentration (mg/g), Central Liver Concentration (mg/g), Antithrombin (%)
model_information.indication: Hemophilia A and B with inhibitors
model_information.applications: Dose-selection, clinical trial simulation, population PK-PD analysis
